@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "metal3-io-580-typo-in-bootmacaddress-causes-non-obvious-failures",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metal3-io: Typo in bootMACAddress causes non-obvious failures",
+    "description": "Typo in bootMACAddress causes non-obvious failures. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify metal3-io troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your metal3-io deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metal3-io configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant metal3-io configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl get configmap -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metal3-io\n```\nIf someone accidentally writes `bootMacAddress` instead of `bootMACAddress` (or any other similar typo) we skip creating the ironic port for that node and silently ignore the wrong key containing the MAC."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Typo in bootMACAddress causes non-obvious failures",
+        "description": "This causes stricter client-side validation against the schema\nso that problems like typos in the user-provided BMH yaml can\nbe caught earlier and report a clear error message.\n```yaml\n$ kubectl apply -f bmhosts_crs.yaml\nsecret/node-0-bmc-secret unchanged\nerror: error validating \"bmhosts_crs.yaml\": error validating data: ValidationError(BareMetalHost.spec): unknown field \"bootMacAddress\" in io.metal3.v1alpha1.BareMetalHost.spec; if you choose to ignore these errors, turn validation off with --validate=false\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Typo in bootMACAddress causes non-obvious failures is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n metal3-io --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This causes stricter client-side validation against the schema\nso that problems like typos in the user-provided BMH yaml can\nbe caught earlier and report a clear error message.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ kubectl apply -f bmhosts_crs.yaml\nsecret/node-0-bmc-secret unchanged\nerror: error validating \"bmhosts_crs.yaml\": error validating data: ValidationError(BareMetalHost.spec): unknown field \"bootMacAddress\" in io.metal3.v1alpha1.BareMetalHost.spec; if you choose to ignore these errors, turn validation off with --validate=false"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "metal3-io",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },
